actionCalls.name: BEL_Case_Open_Auto_Reply_for_customercare
actionCalls.label: BEL - Case Open Auto Reply for customercare

actionCalls.name: BEL_Send_Notification_to_Beayens_Sender
actionCalls.label: BEL- Send Notification to Beayens Sender

actionCalls.label: CHL - Send Notification to Email Sender on M2C_atencionclientes

actionCalls.label: CHL - Send Notification to Email Sender on M2C_mantencion

actionCalls.description: Notify Email Sender when a Finland Mail2Case is created​
actionCalls.name: FIN_ALD_Send_Email_to_Sender
actionCalls.label: FIN ALD Send Email to Sender

actionCalls.name: FIN_NF_Send_Email_to_Sender
actionCalls.label: FIN NF Send Email to Sender

actionCalls.label: GER - Case Open Auto reply ARMADA(Amazon)​

actionCalls.name: IND_Care_M2C_notify_email_sender_on_case_open
actionCalls.label: IND - Care M2C notify email sender on case open

actionCalls.name: IND_Feedback_M2C_notify_email_sender_on_case_open

actionCalls.name: PER_M2C_notify_email_sender_on_case_open_reclamos_peru

actionCalls.name: PER_M2C_notify_email_sender_on_case_open_solicitud_peru
actionCalls.label: PER - M2C notify email sender on case open solicitud peru

start.filterFormula: AND(IF((ISBLANK({!$Record.ContactId})),TRUE,NOT({!$Record.Contact.Bypass_Case_Acknowledgment_Mail__c})), OR( AND({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Finland', NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Email_Sender__c}))), AND( OR( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Denmark', {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Chile', {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_India', {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Peru', {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Luxembourg', {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Germany_Ayvens' ), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Email_Sender__c})), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Emailtocasereceiver__c})) ), AND({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Romania', NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Emailtocasereceiver__c}))), ({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Belgium'), AND({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Case_External_Germany', NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Email_Sender__c})), {!$Record.Subsidiary_Indicator_Stored__c} = '27604') ))
